_comment: OTel Demo cross-app corpus manifest. Tracks the run plans that compose the full ~135-run collection per docs5/00 §5.5.5. Updated 2026-06-09 (GCP VM): authored + smoke-validated the 5 deferred chaos-mesh scenarios (4 network + 1 L4 compound) now that chaos-mesh 2.8.2 is confirmed working; full 49-scenario set is live.
_plans_comment: Schema required by collect-dataset-corpus.ps1: each entry needs plan_alias / plan_file / repeat. `repeat` = how many times the WHOLE plan (all its scenarios) executes. Scenario-execs = scenarios_in_plan * repeat. Repeats chosen for docs5/00 §5.5.5 per-scenario coverage (~3 per L1 scenario, 4 per multifault, 8 baseline). Totals: ~21 dataset-runs, ~173 scenario executions. The pilot plan is intentionally NOT in this list (it is a go/no-go subset whose scenarios are already covered here).

plans.purpose: Baselines (no-fault windows) for the negative class. 1 scenario x 8 = 8 execs.
L1 single-fault — 33 scenarios x 3 = 99 execs (~docs5/00 L1 target ~95).
5 NEW Kafka families x 3 = 15 execs — architectural-distance evidence (no OB analogues).
L2 concurrent (5) + L3 cascade (4) = 9 scenarios x 4 = 36 execs — graded difficulty per docs5/00 §5.5.
4 network families + L4 compound = 5 scenarios x 3 = 15 execs (chaos-mesh-dependent; authored 2026-06-09).

pilot_plan.purpose: Phase 2 / GCP go/no-go subset (11 scenarios). Run via collect-dataset-plan.ps1, NOT part of the full-corpus `plans` list above.

notes: Phase 2 local pilot validated on 2026-06-08 (94/94 triage_feature_* columns). GCP pilot otel-demo-gcp-pilot-001 validated 2026-06-09 (94/94 columns, L3 cascade observable, flagd+replicas restored). 2026-06-09: chaos-mesh 2.8.2 confirmed working on the GCP VM, so the 5 previously-deferred chaos scenarios were authored, smoke-validated (ChaosMeshChaos apply/restore + L4 compound mixed-primitive orchestration), and added via the otel-demo-network plan — full 49-scenario set is now live. Total target ~78 runs.
